description: Align Splunk's data retention settings with the company's updated data governance policy (http://localhost:8000, credentials: admin / SplunkAdmin1!). Create a new index named 'audit_trail' with a retention period (frozenTimePeriodInSecs) of 31536000 seconds and a maximum size (maxTotalDataSizeMB) of 5120 MB. Update the 'security_logs' index to a retention period of 31536000 seconds and the 'web_logs' index to 7776000 seconds. Create a saved search named 'Index_Volume_Monitor' that reports on the current data volume across all Splunk indexes using internal index metadata (e.g., '| rest /services/data/indexes', '| dbinspect', or querying '_internal'/'_introspection' metrics).
